texto: It is never prudent to bury our heads in the sand when in distress or faced with adversity
autor: to place our hands over our eyes in a feeble attempt to hide from the inevitable.
explicacao: Citação de to place our hands over our eyes in a feeble attempt to hide from the inevitable. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “It is never prudent to bury our heads in the sand when in distress or faced with adversity” articula reflexao, carlos-wallace, never em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
